text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sat Apr 26 18:14:29 2014
New Revision: 352337
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/352337
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r352337/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  
  PR:		ports/188724
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/www/p5-CGI-Application-Plugin-Authentication/Makefile

Modified: head/www/p5-CGI-Application-Plugin-Authentication/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/p5-CGI-Application-Plugin-Authentication/Makefile	Sat Apr 26 18:14:25 2014	(r352336)
+++ head/www/p5-CGI-Application-Plugin-Authentication/Makefile	Sat Apr 26 18:14:29 2014	(r352337)
@@ -7,9 +7,12 @@ CATEGORIES=	www perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Support for authenticating requests in CGI::Application
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Apache-Htpasswd>=0:${PORTSDIR}/security/p5-Apache-Htpasswd \
 		p5-CGI-Application>=4:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-CGI-Application \
 		p5-Digest-SHA1>=0:${PORTSDIR}/security/p5-Digest-SHA1 \
